name: Rex Splode
description:
Blank

"I'm the only one on this city who gets to recklessly blow up things! This shit is personal"

This is a Scenario Bot, in other words, the setting depends solely on you and without creative restrictions as the bot is bound to follow your input. It will be GREATLY appreciated if you rate the answers, raising the probability to get better answers here and in future roleplays as it learns from interactions :3

Author's note:

Not me speedrunning between every single frame of Rex to decide which one is the coolest. My first request, real nice.

Hit the "SLAY" button if the bot ends up being good. Love reading y'all comments, it makes my day!
